mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id as userId, title, content, comments, likes_count as likesCount, created_time as createdTime, WEIGHT() as relevance FROM articles_search WHERE MATCH(#{keyword}) ORDER BY relevance DESC, created_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{page}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articles_search WHERE MATCH(#{keyword})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO articles_search (id, user_id, title, content, images, views, comments, likes_count, created_time, updated_time, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{images}, #{views}, #{comments}, #{likesCount}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status})
